description: Create a Talon voice command system for managing bookmarks in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\bookmarks\. The system must include a Python module `bookmarks.py` defining actions `user.bookmark_add(name: str, target: str, category: str, target_type: str)`, `user.bookmark_remove(name: str)`, `user.bookmark_open(name: str)`, `user.bookmark_list(category: str) -> str`, and `user.bookmark_list_all() -> str`. This module must read/write from `bookmarks_data.json` and declare a Context that populates a dynamic list `user.bookmark_names`. A `bookmarks.talon` file must define voice commands mapping to these actions: `bookmark add {user.bookmark_categories} <user.text>`, `bookmark open {user.bookmark_names}`, `bookmark remove {user.bookmark_names}`, `bookmark list {user.bookmark_categories}`, `bookmark list all`, and `bookmark save`. Define a static list `user.bookmark_categories` in `bookmarks_list.py` with at least 5 categories (e.g., 'documentation', 'project', 'tool', 'reference', 'personal'). The `bookmarks_data.json` file must contain at least 8 bookmark entries across at least 3 categories, where each entry includes 'name', 'target', 'category', and 'type' ('url', 'file', or 'app') using real targets like 'https://docs.python.org/3/' or 'notepad.exe'.
